SEARCH
Package DAL

Class Trainer

java.lang.Object
DAL.Trainer
public class Trainer extends Object
This class represents a Pokémon Trainer in the system. It contains information about the trainer's details such as age, class and hometown. Getter methods are provided to access the trainer's attributes.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Trainer(int trainerId, String trainerName, int trainerAge, String hometown, String trainerClass)
    Constructor for creating a Trainer object when retrieving data from the database (with the trainerId).
    Trainer(String trainerName, int trainerAge, String hometown, String trainerClass)
    Constructor for creating a Trainer object for insert operations (without the trainerId).

  • Constructor Details

    • Trainer

      public Trainer(String trainerName, int trainerAge, String hometown, String trainerClass)
      Constructor for creating a Trainer object for insert operations (without the trainerId).
      Parameters:
      trainerName - the trainer's name
      trainerAge - the trainer's age
      hometown - the trainer's hometown
      trainerClass - the trainer's class

    • Trainer

      public Trainer(int trainerId, String trainerName, int trainerAge, String hometown, String trainerClass)
      Constructor for creating a Trainer object when retrieving data from the database (with the trainerId).
      Parameters:
      trainerId - the trainer's unique ID
      trainerName - the trainer's name
      trainerAge - the trainer's age
      hometown - the trainer's hometown
      trainerClass - the trainer's class
